short_description: User account locked out after multiple attempts
description: The user is locked out of their Active Directory account. They cannot access their email or workstation.
comments_and_work_notes: Attempted account lock check. User is locked.
closed_note: Unlocked account via Active Directory Users and Computers console. Reset password and checked force change on next logon.

short_description: Outlook client unable to sync mailbox
description: User is reporting Outlook is showing offline and mailbox sync has failed with error code 0x80040115.
comments_and_work_notes: Checked mail server status. Server is up.
closed_note: Instructed user to clear Outlook local OST cache and restart Outlook. Mailbox sync succeeded.

short_description: Runtime error during billing run transaction VF01
description: Transaction VF01 terminated with a short dump. Dump ID: SAPSQL_ARRAY_INSERT_DUPREC. Billing cannot proceed.
comments_and_work_notes: Identified database lock collision. Checking tables.
closed_note: Removed duplicate invoice record from temporary buffer table. Billing transaction completed successfully.

short_description: Permissions missing for shared folder access
description: User is unable to access the Finance shared folder on the file server. Gets access denied.
closed_note: Added user to security group SG_Finance_Read. Permissions synced and folder is now accessible.

short_description: How to export reports to Excel in SAP GUI
description: User is asking for instructions on how to export transaction list to Excel sheet from SAP GUI interface.
closed_note: Resolved by explaining the export path: List -> Export -> Spreadsheet. User confirmed export works.

short_description: Incoming emails delayed by several hours
description: External emails are taking hours to arrive in user inboxes. Internal mail works fine.
closed_note: Cleared blocked queue on the external SMTP proxy server. Mail flow restored to normal.

short_description: HTTP 404 File Not Found on portal homepage
description: Users are receiving HTTP 404 errors when attempting to access the main portal dashboard.
closed_note: Restored index.html from backup. Verified main portal page resolves correctly.

short_description: Database lock collision on material master records
description: Batch import job is failing with database locking conflict error. Material table locked by user_x.
closed_note: Manually released the stale lock entry for material table in SM12. Reran the import job successfully.
